message:
feat: wire write path, integration tests, and IVF-PQ vector search

- Add WASM integration tests (17 tests) and Query DO integration tests (3 tests)
  that run against real WASM binary, skip gracefully when not found
- Wire write path: WasmEngine.buildFragment(), MasterDO.handleAppend() with
  CAS retry loop (ETag-based R2 conditional writes), TableQuery.append(),
  LocalExecutor.append() for disk writes
- Add IVF-PQ WASM bridge (ivf_pq.zig) with slot-based index storage,
  asymmetric PQ distance search, and top-K selection
- Wire IVF-PQ into TS: loadIvfPqIndex/searchIvfPq/freeIvfPqIndex on WasmEngine,
  index-aware routing in QueryDO.scanPages with cache-first R2 fallback
- Add AppendResult, VectorIndexInfo types
